blockers.detail: GitNexus MCP tools are not exposed in this session (ToolSearch found none); CLI 1.6.4 present but no fresh index for this branch. Fallback: direct caller/source reads per CLAUDE.md rule.
Pre-existing: 4 non-web collection errors in the full suite (test_search, test_smoke, and friends). Out of scope; tracked in TODO backlog.

handoffs.result: 8 findings: 5 accepted -> T7, 3 declined with reasons

declined.finding: today_changes shows quiet lines for topics absent from the report (failed topics)
declined.reason: only signal is parsing full_markdown headings (fragile); proper fix is persisting per-topic run outcomes = schema change out of spec scope; logged as known limitation in PR + TODO backlog

declined.finding: updates_today uses date('now') while strip uses report_date
declined.reason: by design: badge copy says 'today' (calendar); strip is anchored to the report date

declined.finding: flat confidence series stroked as rise (>=)
declined.reason: flat-endpoints case is rare; teal reads as 'held'; third stroke state not worth the branch
